prompt: A polished Japanese museum exhibition poster in a contemporary anime illustration style, vertical layout, warm ivory and gold color palette with pastel confetti accents, designed like a high-end promotional ad for a spring holiday event. The composition features 4 school-age to young adult female characters in the foreground and one monumental Buddhist statue in the background. At center back is a towering gilded Thousand-Armed Kannon statue with a radiant halo, intricate carved details, many arms fanning outward symmetrically, and hands pressed together in prayer at the chest, glowing with sacred golden light. In the foreground on the right is the largest figure, a friendly young woman guide or older student reaching one hand dramatically toward the viewer in forced perspective; she has dark brown shoulder-length hair, a blue striped blouse, a cream sweater draped over her shoulders, and a light skirt, with a warm inviting expression. Across the lower middle are 3 younger schoolgirls in matching uniforms: short-sleeve pale blue shirts with navy ribbon ties and dark blue skirts. The left girl points upward excitedly with one arm raised and wears a small shoulder bag; the center girl holds an exhibition booklet upright; the right girl drinks from a clear water bottle while looking toward the scene. Give all 4 girls lively anime-style faces, glossy hair, soft shading, and energetic museum-outing body language. Fill the poster with dense Japanese typography and decorative graphic shapes. Place a large bold main headline on the left reading 国宝を見に行こう!, with oversized gold and black calligraphy-style characters and one red-highlighted character. Above it, add smaller text: "千手観音、祈りの宇宙". Add a red circular callout near the top left that says "はじめての美術館にもおすすめ!" and a white cloud-shaped speech bubble near the top right that says "いっしょに新しい発見をしよう!". Add a gold ribbon banner under the main headline reading "アスキー美術館 GW開催". Include a pale blue circular information box on the left with 5 lines of Japanese copy describing the statue: "国宝 千手観音立像", "千の手が、千年の祈りを", "伝える", "圧巻のスケールを、", "その目で感じてみて。". In the lower left, place a dark rectangular exhibition plaque with gold trim and 5 text lines: "アスキー美術館 GW特別展", the large title "国宝展", then "千手観音、祈りの宇宙", then the date line 2026.4.26 SAT - 6.15 SUN. Along the bottom center, add the museum name in large text: アスキー美術館, followed by a smaller address line and nearest-station access text in Japanese. Add a red-and-black slogan along the bottom right: "心に残る体験が、きっとここに。". In the lower right, include 3 circular benefit icons with captions: one peach circle with a ticket icon and text "学生はお得! 学生証提示で当日券200円OFF!", one blue circle with a camera icon and text "撮影OK! 一部の作品は写真撮影OK!", and one gold circle with a gift icon and text "来場者プレゼント! オリジナルしおりをプレゼント!". Scatter subtle sparkles, halftone dots, abstract blobs, and confetti shapes around the page. Overall mood: inviting, educational, elegant, and exciting, combining sacred cultural grandeur with cheerful youthful discovery, like a fictional premium museum advertisement generated as a complete poster with integrated typography.
